description: Negative fixture cases for the stable version-window freeze gate. Each case is a complete freeze that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_stable_version_windows.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the surface-narrowing and packet-freshness-SLO rejections honest even if the canonical freeze changes shape.

cases.summary: A window row whose state forces narrowing still freezes a Stable lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A frozen window row rides a freeze packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached, so the packet-freshness automation must narrow it before publication.
